intro_html: What you're looking at is everything Pneuma keeps for this session — the things that aren't in the file tree because editing them as raw JSON would be more friction than help. They live under <1>.pneuma/sessions/{{sessionShort}}…/</1> on disk.
part_of_project: Part of project <1>{{name}}</1>. Project-level info (cover, sibling sessions, project preferences) is on the Project chip in the top-left.
hidden_body: The file tree intentionally drops Pneuma's bookkeeping — <1>session.json</1>, <2>history.json</2>, <3>CLAUDE.md</3>, <4>shadow.git/</4>, <5>checkpoints.jsonl</5>, and the installed <6>.claude/skills/</6>. They're managed by the agent and runtime; raw JSON edits would usually break something. The cards above show what they contain. As parts of them grow stable schemas, each will get its own controlled edit form.
